<!--
  Thanks for contributing to libVES.c!

  Before opening a PR, please note:
  - Security fixes do NOT belong in a public PR — see SECURITY.md.
  - Changes to cryptography, the API surface, or the wire protocol should
    start with an issue first; we can't always merge protocol/service-affecting
    changes. Small, focused fixes are always welcome.
-->

## What does this change?

<!-- A short description, and the issue it addresses (e.g. "Fixes #123"). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (no behavior change beyond fixing the bug)
- [ ] New feature / option
- [ ] Build / packaging / docs
- [ ] Cryptography, API-surface, or protocol change (was this discussed in an issue first?)

## Checklist

- [ ] This is **not** a security vulnerability (those follow SECURITY.md).
- [ ] Builds cleanly (`./configure && make`) with no new warnings.
- [ ] I tested the change (note how — platform, `ves` commands, or test cases).
- [ ] Code matches the style of the surrounding code.
- [ ] Protocol/crypto/API-surface changes were raised in an issue before coding.
